.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
body.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

html.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(143, 188, 187) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(32, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(143, 188, 187) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(32, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(32, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(57, 57, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(66, 66, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(57, 57, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(0, 121, 145) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
